description_long: This is a male security guard dressed in a utilitarian olive green bomber jacket over a dark shirt, paired with brown cargo pants and sturdy black boots. He wears black gloves and sunglasses, giving him a vigilant and authoritative appearance suitable for urban patrol. A grey utility belt is fastened around his waist, equipped with pouches and holsters, suggesting readiness for carrying essential security tools. The guard has a neatly groomed beard and short hair, and an earpiece is visible on his right ear, indicating communication capability. His stance is upright and alert, with arms slightly extended and hands relaxed, ready for action. The overall look is practical, professional, and designed for both mobility and presence in public or private urban environments.
description: A vigilant male security guard in an olive bomber jacket, brown cargo pants, and black boots, equipped with a utility belt and earpiece, exuding readiness and authority.
description_view_0: Front view shows the guard's facial features, sunglasses, zipped jacket, utility belt, and both hands with gloves clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the earpiece, the side of the utility belt, and the layered clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the jacket, the belt with pouches, and the back of the boots and pants.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the earpiece, glove details, and the side profile of the utility belt and holsters.
attribute_uniform_type: The security guard wears an olive green bomber jacket over a dark shirt, brown cargo pants, and black tactical boots, complemented by black gloves and sunglasses. The uniform is practical and semi-formal, featuring a standardized utility belt with pouches and holsters, and an earpiece for communication, with no hat or tie present.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with feet shoulder-width apart, arms slightly extended and hands relaxed, projecting alertness and readiness.
